# PERF-165 negative: implement sql.Scanner on the custom type
lang: go
file: PERF-165-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"database/sql/driver"
	"errors"
	"strconv"
)

type MyID int64

func (m *MyID) Scan(src interface{}) error {
	switch s := src.(type) {
	case int64:
		*m = MyID(s)
		return nil
	case string:
		n, err := strconv.ParseInt(s, 10, 64)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		*m = MyID(n)
		return nil
	default:
		return errors.New("unsupported scan type")
	}
}

func LoadID(rows *sql.Rows) (MyID, error) {
	var id MyID
	if err := rows.Scan(&id); err != nil {
		return 0, err
	}
	return id, nil
}

var _ driver.Valuer = (*MyID)(nil)

func (m MyID) Value() (driver.Value, error) {
	return int64(m), nil
}
